name: Experimental Field Generator
title: Unfinished Ideal: Experimental Field Generator
desc: A product of the Fontaine Research Institute of Kinetic Energy Engineering that has gone out of control due to an accident. It has the ability to "counteract" the effects of gravity.

attributes.source: Reward for accepting the Tavern Challenge at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with Experimental Field Generator

skills.name: Gravity Application: Point Null
skills.desc: Deal ? ? and generate 2 stacks of Efficient Switch.

skills.name: Gravity Application: Field Reduction
skills.desc: Deal ? ?, as well as generate Low Gravity Background and Shock Blast. During this Round, all your characters on standby use 1 less Unaligned Element when using their next Normal Attack.
